Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade__quartiles", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) FILTER (WHERE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" != 0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade__nonzero_quartiles" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/34a571745e20b7d1f96f434116550dab71a81d102fd810bf3e9a955bf0c074e8/99c6480b-cc43-43f5-a20e-655ade85e7da/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
